name: bus-ai-ticketing-final-project
description: He thong dat ve xe khach lien tinh tich hop AI, GraphQL, gRPC, Microservices, Redis, RabbitMQ/Kafka, Nginx va MCP.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,GQL,TRIP,SEAT,BOOKING,AI,ANALYTICS,TICKET,EMAIL -c blue,magenta,green,cyan,yellow,white,red,gray "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w services/gateway" "npm run dev -w services/trip-service" "npm run dev -w services/seat-service" "npm run dev -w services/booking-service" "npm run dev -w services/ai-service" "npm run dev -w workers/analytics-worker" "npm run dev -w workers/ticket-worker" "npm run dev -w workers/email-worker"
